title: RuntimeToolchainDescriptor
description: Digest-addressed runtime-toolchain identity descriptor used by trusted admission.

schema_id.description: Protocol schema identifier for runtime-toolchain descriptors.

schema_version.description: Protocol schema version for runtime-toolchain descriptors.

descriptor_digest.description: Digest identity for the canonical runtime-toolchain descriptor payload.

artifact_digests.description: Immutable toolchain artifacts addressed by digest and keyed by logical artifact name.

additionalProperties.description: Digest identity for one toolchain artifact.

publication_bundle_digest.description: Optional digest identity for immutable publication or signature-bundle metadata.
